arts.ttl: Chelsea news: Axel Disasi REJECTS Tottenham despite transfer agreement
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have agreed a deal to sign Axel Disasi on loan until the end of the season, but the Chelsea star has reportedly rejected the move. Tottenham have recently ramped up talks to sign Disasi on a short-term deal until the end of the campaign and they have now reached an agreement with Chelsea, according to Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher left red-faced after brutal Tottenham prediction backfires
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham claimed a vital three points with a 2-0 win away at Brentford in the Premier League, putting Jamie Carragher's pre-match prediction to shame

arts.ttl: Spurs boss Postecoglou hails Brentford win and Danso signing
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou praised the performance from his players as Tottenham earned a 2-0 win at Brentford in the Premier League. Spurs snapped a run of seven league games without a win with a disciplined display at the Gtech Community Stadium. arts.ttl: Tottenham show a different side to give themselves a big lift ahead of decisive week
arts.sum: Spurs dig in to seal first Premier League win since December with impressive defensive performance

arts.ttl: Tottenham agree deal with rivals to sign 26-year-old, but they have a problem
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Axel Disasi has been linked with a move away from the club this month and Tottenham Hotspur have agreed on a deal to sign him on loan.
